title: Moon Bottles - Insulated Water Bottle That Lasts Forever - 18/8 Stainless Steel Vacuum Flask - Double Walled Drink Bottle - Thermal Metal Flasks, Leakproof, 24hrs Cold & 12 Hot (260ml, Silver)
features: Zero Guilt Water Bottle, Guaranteed To Last Forever: Fed up with replacing your underperforming water bottle every few years, or overpaying to cover the costs of a large multinational company? Want a zero-risk, guilt-free product from a boutique UK company? Moon Bottles are high performance, double-walled drink bottles, so you'll always be 100% satisfied that your fluids have been kept cold for the full 24 hours and hot for the full 12.

Risk Free, One-Time Purchase: We're so confident in the high quality of our stainless steel water bottles that if you're not fully satisfied with your product, get in contact with us at any time and we'll offer you a full refund - This is our "Full Moon" Money Back Guarantee. By drinking from a reusable metal flask that lasts forever, you may never need to buy another water bottle ever again. Good for you, great for the earth.

Be Proud Of Your Bottle: With a range of neutral colours that'll never go out of style, you can take the Moon Bottle anywhere. It can be used to hydrate for travel, work, gym, camping, sports, in the car or relaxing at home. Every bottle also comes with gift box, so makes the perfect eco gift for women, men, girls, boys, adults or kids.

Will Never Leak - Want access to ice cold or piping hot fluids all day long with zero chance of leaks ruining your day? Our advanced double-walled construction ensures the temperature inside your bottle is not be effected by the weather outside. Pack the vacuum flask in your bag with the confidence that every insulated bottle has been tested to be 100% Leak Proof. Whilst the non-scratch base will keep your Moon Bottle looking brand new for as long as possible.

UK Company, Local Support: We're a boutique, online-only UK brand, so can charge less for insulated drink bottles made from premium 18/8 Stainless Steel. We instead focus our efforts on giving back to the environment & treating our customers like family. Don't chance it on cheaper versions or pay more to cover the costs of a big business. Instead, shoot for the Moon.
